intro: Nephrodium acutum, also known as the Acute Lady Fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the Acute Lady Fern has been used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in treating various health conditions such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues.
